title: helenium autumnale var. grandiflorum
intro: Helenium autumnale var. grandiflorum, commonly known as Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It is used in herbal medicine to treat various conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat health issues such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, as well as to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Sneezeweed include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to make teas, take as supplements, or apply topically to affected areas.
